name: 太医

appearance.distinguishing_features: 医者冷静感，诊脉时神情严谨

costume.typical_outfit: 太医院官服或素色医者长袍

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese imperial physician, elderly calm face, traditional robe, serious medical consultation scene, historical drama
desire: 如实诊断，尽力保全病患
flaw: 只能在制度框架内行事
scene_presence: 诊断胎儿性别、难产现场等
